case_title: DESOTO CAB COOPERATIVE INC VS. ALOBAID ALOBAID

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $887.98 FILED BY DESOTO CAB COOPERATIVE INC AS TO DEFENDANT ALOBAID, ADNAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75.00 SERVED JAN-19-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALOBAID, ADNAN
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT ADNAN ALOBAID RE: SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUN-01-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COOPERATIVE INC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APOEARANCE BY PLAINTIF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COOPERATIVE INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALOBAID, ADNAN $887.98 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $992.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ADNAN ALOBAID.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ALOBAID, ADNAN
